query:
-- Delete blank aggregate SS services that have both cost AND revenue
-- (revenue is already captured in individual Xero S-prefix records for the same customers)
DELETE FROM services
WHERE (planName IS NULL OR planName = '' OR planName = '(blank)')
  AND provider = 'SasBoss'
  AND LEFT(externalId, 2) = 'SS'
  AND monthlyCost > 0
  AND monthlyRevenue > 0;

-- Set billingPlatform = 'SasBoss' on all SasBoss provider services that don't have it set
UPDATE services
SET billingPlatform = 'SasBoss',
    updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE provider = 'SasBoss'
  AND (billingPlatform IS NULL OR billingPlatform = '');
